evidence: Great thriller, and I never even guessed the bad guy. Well worth your time to watch.

Words do very little justice. Watch it.

summary: The user has a strong preference for thrillers and dramas, particularly those with complex narratives and high production quality. They show loyalty to Elmore Leonard's work and appreciate emotional depth in storytelling.
